title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Yatra Capital India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Yatra Capital India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Yatra Capital India family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Visakhapatnam. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Yatra Capital India:
Yatra Capital India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Shopify

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Flexible working hours
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yatra Capital India!
